sentences.arabic: النَّثْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ مَلِيءٌ بِالْحِكَمِ وَالْأَمْثَالِ الْقَصِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska proza je puna mudrosti i kratkih poslovica.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic prose is full of wisdom and short proverbs.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ هَذِهِ الْجُمَلَ لِيَتَعَلَّمُوا مِنْ تَجَارِبِ الْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju ove rečenice kako bi učili iz iskustava drugih.
sentences.translationEn: People read these sentences to learn from the experiences of others.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْخُطَبَاءُ يَتَحَدَّثُونَ بِلُغَةٍ فَصِيحَةٍ وَوَاضِحَةٍ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Govornici su nekada govorili veoma rječitim i jasnim jezikom.
sentences.translationEn: Orators used to speak in very eloquent and clear language.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ كَلِمَةٍ فِي النَّثْرِ لَهَا مَعْنًى عَمِيقٌ وَهَدَفٌ مُفِيدٌ.
sentences.translation: Svaka riječ u prozi ima duboko značenje i korisnu svrhu.
sentences.translationEn: Every word in prose has a deep meaning and a useful purpose.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَسْتَعْمِلُ بَعْضَ هَذِهِ الْأَمْثَالِ فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ حَتَّى الْآنَ.
sentences.translation: Neke od ovih poslovica koristimo u svakodnevnom životu i danas.
sentences.translationEn: We still use some of these proverbs in our daily lives even now.
